steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The underlined claim says Reckoning and Resilience is set apart by the breadth of disciplines represented. Supporting evidence must show that the exhibition includes multiple artistic disciplines.

steps.title: Choose evidence of breadth
steps.content: A gives photography only, B discusses the museum's collection rather than the exhibition, and D discusses ownership of works. The useful evidence must show several disciplines in the exhibition. The answer is C.
